The mass contact programme created a direct bond with citizens and laid the foundation for the Praja Palana (People’s Governance) model. Reason the 6am email from 'Oracle leadership' told thousands of laid-off employees
description: Oracle has begun its largest-ever round of layoffs, with employees receiving termination emails from "Oracle Leadership" at 6AM saying their roles had been eliminated after "careful consideration of Oracle's current business needs." Around 10,000 employees have reportedly been cut so far, with estimates suggesting the total could reach 30,000. The email gave employees a narrow window to act before systems were deactivated.

title: Watch: 60-foot-high swing ride carrying 80 people collapses in UP
description: A 60-foot-high swing ride at the Bhainsaha Mela in Kushinagar collapsed mid-operation, injuring at least 30 people, including women and children. The overcrowded ride reportedly failed due to a weak, improperly anchored base. Rescue efforts were challenging, with critically injured individuals transferred to hospitals.
